items.label: United Kingdom
items.hint: An island nation off the northwest coast of the continent.

items.label: France
items.hint: Western Europe's largest country by area.

items.label: Spain
items.hint: Occupies most of the Iberian Peninsula.

items.label: Germany
items.hint: Central Europe's most populous country, reunified in 1990.

items.label: Italy
items.hint: A boot-shaped peninsula extending into the Mediterranean.

items.label: Poland
items.hint: A large North European Plain country between Germany and Belarus.

items.label: Greece
items.hint: Cradle of democracy, at the southern tip of the Balkan Peninsula.
